event.description: The session storage that the `express-session` module provides explicitly or by default is insecure. This type of memory storage leaks memory under most conditions. An attacker may create numerous active sessions and cause a Denial-of-Service situation.

Set the `store` property to a third-party secure storage, such as MongoDB or Redis for a production environment. Use `connect-mongo` or `connect-redis` libraries accordingly to configure the session storage.

typePropertiesGroup.longDescription: The session storage that the `express-session` module provides explicitly or by default is insecure. This type of memory storage leaks memory under most conditions. An attacker may create numerous active sessions and cause a Denial-of-Service situation.
